function.message: Completed the next inbound note request. I ran the listed 8 finance documents through the OCR/structuring workflow by adding schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to each file and preserving each original body verbatim below the frontmatter. Then I deleted the processed inbox request file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed root and nested AGENTS guidance, inspected 99_system before task work, used process-next-inbox-item and OCR/schema docs, preserved full original bodies during migration, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly listed 8 finance files for OCR workflow processing. Each listed file was read, then rewritten with required invoice/bill frontmatter fields extracted from visible note content and with the original body preserved verbatim. After successful completion, the processed inbox file was deleted per inbox workflow.
completed_steps_laconic: write 8 migrated finance files with frontmatter
